{{Quote|A somber personal note must accompany this entry, for Captain Detan was a good friend of mine, and an excellent officer.|General Airen Cracken|<ref name="WBC" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Narn Detan''' served as an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and a good friend of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. While leading [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] assisting in the re-establishment of the government of a colony in the [[Geal system/Legends|Geal system]], Detan was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Moxin Tark]].
